name: Iso11783OPShowObject
title: Iso11783OPShowObject
syntax: long Iso11783OPShowObject( dword ecuHandle, dword objectID, dword show );
description: The function shows or hides an object. The Show Object command is sent to the Virtual Terminal.

parameters.name: ecuHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the ECU (must be created with Iso11783CreateECU)
